Snake.io

Guide your snake through three challenging levels, consuming glowing pellets and defeating AI opponents to grow longer. Navigate carefully to avoid collisions with walls, obstacles, and other snakes. Reach the target length for each level to advance. Use your boost strategically to escape danger or chase opponents, but be careful—it costs you mass! Defeat AI snakes by making them crash into your body, then collect their remains to grow even larger.

Arrow Left/Right: Turn your snake left or right | Space or Shift: Activate speed boost (costs mass) | Enter: Start game or confirm menu selections | Escape: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to main menu from game over screen

<hard_constraints>

    - ESC (27)    – pause / unpause

  - Proper imports:

```javascript
// Essential pattern (ALWAYS follow this)
```

  - Use a single `gameState` object to track the game's current data and status. Store all game data in the `gameState` object to be used by automated testing code to play-test the game.    
```javascript
export const gameState = {

  entities: [],       // all game entities including player
```

- p.logs is write-only. Do not reset it. We want to keep track of all the logs since the start of the p5.js game instance.
- Variables to store in the p.logs during gameplay:
  - In "game_info": Information about the game when there are changes in the game phases

Snake.io

Guide your snake through three challenging levels, consuming glowing pellets and defeating AI opponents to grow longer. Navigate carefully to avoid collisions with walls, obstacles, and other snakes. Reach the target length for each level to advance. Use your boost strategically to escape danger or chase opponents, but be careful—it costs you mass! Defeat AI snakes by making them crash into your body, then collect their remains to grow even larger.

Arrow Left/Right: Turn your snake left or right | Space or Shift: Activate speed boost (costs mass) | Enter: Start game or confirm menu selections | Escape: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to main menu from game over screen
